items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to agent-specific rate limits. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or results from the simulation of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected result was achieved. Without concrete evidence of the scenario's execution and its outcomes, it is impossible to determine if the requirement is satisfied.
